description: 今日 AI 开源领域呈现**"智能体基础设施大爆炸"**态势：Claude 生态成为绝对焦点，[ruvnet/ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo) 单日暴涨 2598 stars 登顶，标志着多智能体编排平台进入工程化落地阶段。终端原生 AI 工具持续升温，[DeepSeek-TUI](https://github.com/Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI) 与 [jcode](https://github.com/1jehuang/jcode) 两大 Rust 编码智能体同日爆发，反映开发者对"本地优先、终端原生"体验的强烈需求。MCP（Model Context Protocol）作为智能体互操作标准迅速渗透，[n8n-mcp](https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp) 等项目验证了协议生态的扩展性。金融垂直场景成为 Agent 落地先锋，[TradingAgents](https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents) 与 [dexter](https://github.com/virattt/dexter) 双星闪耀，暗示专业领域自主研究智能体正从 demo 走向生产。

| [browserbase/skills](https://github.com/browserbase/skills) | 0 → **+320 today** | Claude Agent SDK + 网页浏览工具，浏览器自动化能力成为智能体标配基础设施 |
| [ollama/ollama](https://github.com/ollama/ollama) | **170,691** | 本地大模型运行的事实标准，新增 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5 等模型支持，持续巩固端侧生态 |
| [vllm-project/vllm](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm) | **79,016** | 高吞吐 LLM 推理引擎，生产级部署的核心基建，与 ollama 形成"开发-生产"闭环 |
| [CherryHQ/cherry-studio](https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio) | **45,006** | 聚合 300+ 助手的 AI 生产力工作站，统一接入前沿模型，国产开源客户端代表 |

**智能体编排层爆发**：今日增速 TOP3 均为智能体基础设施——[ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)（+2598）、[TradingAgents](https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents)（+2182）、[agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)（+1189），标志着社区从"单智能体 demo"跃迁至"多智能体系统工程"。Claude 生态成为最大赢家，ruflo 明确绑定 Claude Code/Codex，配合 [n8n-mcp](https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp) 的 MCP 协议扩展，Anthropic 的开放标准策略正在形成事实上的互操作生态。
| [NousResearch/hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent) | **132,685** | "与你共同成长"的渐进式智能体，Nous Research 在个性化 Agent 架构上的前沿探索 |
| [browser-use/browser-use](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use) | **92,089** | 让网站为 AI 智能体可访问，浏览器自动化的事实标准，被众多项目依赖 |
| [OpenHands/OpenHands](https://github.com/OpenHands/OpenHands) | **72,618** | AI 驱动开发的开源标杆，代码生成与软件工程任务的端到端解决方案 |
| [activepieces/activepieces](https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces) | **22,044** | ~400 个 MCP 服务器的 AI 自动化平台，"AI 工作流 + MCP 生态"的双轮驱动 |
| [fspecii/ace-step-ui](https://github.com/fspecii/ace-step-ui) | 0 → **+237 today** | ACE-Step 1.5 AI 音乐生成的专业 UI，"开源 Suno 替代"定位直击 AIGC 音乐付费痛点 |

| [santifer/career-ops](https://github.com/santifer/career-ops) | **42,478** | 基于 Claude Code 的 AI 求职系统，14 种技能模式 + PDF 生成，个人 Agent 应用典范 |

| [galilai-group/stable-pretraining](https://github.com/galilai-group/stable-pretraining) | **216** | 稳定预训练基础库，世界模型预训练的可靠性工程 |

A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features    enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

Gradio WebUI for creators and developers, featuring key TTS (Edge-TTS, kokoro) and zero-shot Voice Cloning (E2 & F5-TTS, CosyVoice), with Whisper audio processing, YouTube download, Demucs vocal isolation, and multilingual translation.
VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme

Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code, or knowledge base (Karpathy LLM wiki), into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
An autonomous agent for deep financial research
